description: Tomorrow.io provides weather intelligence products and a developer weather API for realtime, forecast, historical, maps, alerts, and related operational weather data. The company also publishes LLM-oriented API documentation and an MCP endpoint for AI-agent access.
summary: Tomorrow.io exposes a REST Weather API at https://api.tomorrow.io/v4 authenticated with its API key, plus a public MCP server at https://api.tomorrow.io/v4/weather-apps/mcp.
